signals.raw:
US-Iran Ceasefire Extended (April 22, 2026) | YES | MED confidence**  
Markets reacted positively to the extension of the US-Iran ceasefire, announced today, which could ease energy price spikes driving March 2026 inflation (headline CPI at 3.3% YoY, core at 2.6%).[1][3][5]  
This geopolitical de-escalation aligns with Goldman Sachs' April 20 forecast of oil prices pulling back to $80/barrel by Q4
